name: Unsuccessful login with invalid credentials
fullName: cypress/e2e/features/login.feature#Login Functionality Unsuccessful login with invalid credentials

steps.name: Given the user is on the login page
When the user enters invalid credentials

parameters.name: Yielded
parameters.value: <input autocomplete="off" placeholder="" class="peer w-full outline-none border-none bg-transparent!" id="email" type="email" value="">

parameters.name: Applied To
parameters.value: <input autocomplete="off" placeholder="" class="peer w-full outline-none border-none bg-transparent!" id="email" type="email" value="">

parameters.name: Yielded
parameters.value: <input autocomplete="off" placeholder="" class="peer w-full outline-none border-none bg-transparent!" id="password" type="password" value="">

parameters.name: Applied To
parameters.value: <input autocomplete="off" placeholder="" class="peer w-full outline-none border-none bg-transparent!" id="password" type="password" value="">

steps.name: And the user clicks the login button
get body > app-root > ng-component > article > main > form > button

parameters.name: subject
parameters.value: <button btn="" type="submit" fill="true" size="compact" variant="secondary" class="flex items-center justify-center data-[fill=true]:w-full data-[fill=false]:w-fit h-12 data-[size=compact]:h-8 px-3 text-center cursor-pointer rounded-md text-white bg-primary data-[variant=secondary]:bg-secondary data-[variant=light]:bg-gray-50 data-[variant=disabled]:bg-disabled data-[variant=icon]:bg-transparent transition-colors duration-500 hover:bg-primary-darker data-[variant=secondary]:hover:bg-secondary-darker data-[variant=light]:hover:bg-gray-100 data-[variant=disabled]:hover:bg-disabled/70 data-[variant=icon]:hover:bg-gray-100 data-[variant=black]:bg-black data-[variant=black]:hover:bg-black/80 data-[variant=icon]:rounded-full data-[variant=icon]:aspect-square data-[variant=icon]:w-12 data-[variant=icon]:text-current data-[variant=icon]:data-[rounded=false]:rounded-none data-[active=true]:bg-primary! data-[active=true]:text-white!" data-variant="secondary" data-size="compact" data-fill="true" data-active="" data-rounded="true" routerlink="">Entrar</button>

parameters.name: Selector
parameters.value: body > app-root > ng-component > article > main > form > button

steps.name: Then the user should see an error message indicating invalid credentials
get body > app-root > ng-component > article > main > form > field:nth-child(3) > span
assert expected <span.text-xs.text-red-500.mt-1.block.px-2> to contain Usuário ou senha inválidos

parameters.name: Selector
parameters.value: body > app-root > ng-component > article > main > form > field:nth-child(3) > span
